title: Ubiquiti UACC-Lock-Bolt-Secure, Electric fail-secure bolt lock
description: The UACC-Lock-Bolt-Secure is an electric drop bolt lock that connects to a UniFi Access Hub . The lock is fail-secure, remaining locked in the event of failure . It can be installed in wooden, steel, and aluminum frames. The device features a built-in DPS (door position sensor), allowing monitoring of the door open/closed status. Power is supplied via a three-wire terminal block 12V/600mA UA-Hub-Door UA-Hub-Door-Mini UA-Hub-Gate EAH-8 UA-Ultra
specsSearch: Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 7,2 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC
